products.productName: nRF Connect SDK Host component v3.3.1
products.description: LE Host component with support for indicated features in GAP, GATT, ATT, L2CAP and SM. Future releases may share the same ICS selections and DN. Check www.nordicsemi.com for further information and applicability of this host component. This host version includes support for the Channel Sounding feature in GAP.

LE Controller for nRF52 series utilizing the Nordic SoftDevice controller design released with the NCS tag 3.3.1. Refer to the relevant nRF Connect SDK documentation at docs.nordicsemi.com for specific applicability of this controller and the layer and role support available for each nRF52 device in the series.

products.productName: SoftDevice Controller component superset for nRF Connect SDK v3.3.1
products.description: LE component for utilizing the Nordic SoftDevice controller design based on the nRF Connect SDK v3.3.1. Refer to the relevant nRF Connect SDK documentation at docs.nordicsemi.com for specific applicability of this controller and the role support available for each applicable Nordic device. This version includes support for Channel Sounding and Power Class 1. The RFPHY layer is not included in this component.

products.productName: SoftDevice Controller component for nRF54H without PC1
products.description: LE Controller for nRF54H series utilizing the Nordic SoftDevice controller design based on the NCS tag 3.2.x. Refer to the relevant nRF Connect SDK documentation at docs.nordicsemi.com for specific applicability of this controller and the role support available for each nRF54H device in the series. This subset removes the Power Class one feature.

products.productName: SoftDevice Controller for nRF54Lxx with CS
products.description: LE Controller for nRF54Lxx series devices utilizing the Nordic SoftDevice controller design based on the nRF Connect SDK tag 3.2.x. Refer to the relevant nRF Connect SDK documentation at docs.nordicsemi.com for specific applicability of this controller and the role support available for each nRF54Lxx device in the series. This design supports the Channel Sounding feature.

Core-complete S115 SoftDevice, release 9.0.x. Support for indicated features in RFPHY, LL, LESEC, GAP, GATT, ATT, L2CAP and SM. Future releases as 9.0.x may share the same ICS selections and DN. Check www.nordicsemi.com for further information and applicability of this design. S115 is supported on nRF54xxx series devices.

Core-complete S145 SoftDevice, release 9.0.x. Support for indicated features in RFPHY, LL, LESEC, GAP, GATT, ATT, L2CAP and SM. Future releases as 9.0.x may share the same ICS selections and DN. Check www.nordicsemi.com for further information and applicability of this design. S145 is supported on nRF54xxx series devices.

LE Controller for nRF52 series utilizing the Nordic SoftDevice controller design released with the NCS tag 3.2.x. Refer to the relevant nRF Connect SDK documentation at docs.nordicsemi.com for specific applicability of this controller and the layer and role support available for each nRF52 device in the series.

LE Controller for nRF53 series utilizing the Nordic SoftDevice controller design based on the NCS tag 3.2.x. Refer to the relevant nRF Connect SDK documentation at docs.nordicsemi.com for specific applicability of this controller and the role support available for each nRF53 device in the series.

Host and controller subset for S116 SoftDevice, release 9.0.x. Support for indicated features in RFPHY, LL, LESEC, GAP, GATT, ATT, L2CAP and SM. Future releases as 9.0.x may share the same ICS selections and DN. Check www.nordicsemi.com for further information and applicability of this design. S116 is supported on nRF52 series devices.

Host and controller subset for S125 SoftDevice, release 9.0.x. Support for indicated features in RFPHY, LL, LESEC, IAL, GAP, GATT, ATT, L2CAP and SM. Future releases as 9.0.x may share the same ICS selections and DN. Check docs.nordicsemi.com for further information and applicability of this design. S125 is supported on nRF52 series devices.

Host and controller superset for S149 SoftDevice, release 9.0.x. Support for indicated features in RFPHY, LL, IAL, GAP, GATT, ATT, L2CAP and SM. Future releases as 9.0.x may share the same ICS selections and DN. Check www.nordicsemi.com for further information and applicability of this design. S149 is supported on nRF52 series devices.

LE Controller for nRF54Lxx series devices utilizing the Nordic SoftDevice controller design based on the nRF Connect SDK tag 3.2.x. Refer to the relevant nRF Connect SDK documentation at docs.nordicsemi.com for specific applicability of this controller and the role support available for each nRF54Lxx device in the series.

Bluetooth Mesh protocol stack with support for indicated features in the Mesh Protocol v1.1.1, Mesh Model v1.1.1, NLC Profiles v1.0.1 and HVAC Integration NLC Profile v1.0, Device Firmware Update Model v1.0, Mesh BLOB Transfer Model v1.0 specifications. Documentation can be found at: https://docs.nordicsemi.com/

The nRF52 Series of system on chip (SoC) devices embed a powerful yet low-power ARM® Cortex®-M4 processor with our industry leading 2.4 GHz RF transceivers. In combination with the very flexible orthogonal power management system and a programmable peripheral interconnect (PPI) event system, the nRF52 Series enables you to make ultra-low power Bluetooth solutions. CTE for the Direction Finding feature is supported in this version for the nRF52833 devices.
The nRF52833 DK is an affordable single-board development kit for development of Bluetooth® Low Energy, Bluetooth mesh, NFC, Thread and Zigbee applications on the nRF52833 SoC.

The nRF52 Series of system on chip (SoC) devices embed a powerful yet low-power ARM® Cortex®-M4 processor with our industry leading 2.4 GHz RF transceivers. In combination with the very flexible orthogonal power management system and a programmable peripheral interconnect (PPI) event system, the nRF52 Series enables you to make ultra-low power Bluetooth solutions. This ICS subset covers devices in the 52 series which do not yet support the continuous tone extension (CTE) feature.

The nRF5340 DK is the development kit for the nRF5340 System-on-Chip (SoC), containing everything needed to get started with development, on a single board. The DK supports development with an extensive range of wireless protocols. It supports Bluetooth Low Energy with features such as high-throughput 2 Mbps, Advertising Extensions and Long Range. Mesh protocols like Bluetooth mesh, Thread and Zigbee can run concurrently with Bluetooth Low Energy, enabling smartphones to provision, commission, configure and control mesh nodes. NFC, ANT, 802.15.4 and 2.4 GHz proprietary protocols are also supported.
Development kit for the nRF5340, a dual-core Bluetooth 5.3 SoC supporting Bluetooth Low Energy, Bluetooth mesh, NFC, Matter, Thread and Zigbee
Our nRF5340 Audio Development Kit (DK) is the recommended platform for Bluetooth LE Audio products and contains everything needed to start development. It supports all Auracast™ features.

The Nordic Thingy:53 is a multi-sensor prototyping platform for Matter,
embedded machine learning (ML) and other wireless IoT products. It is
based on the nRF5340 System-on-Chip (SoC). With integrated sensors for motion, sound, light and environmental
factors, it is the perfect platform for building proof-of-concepts and
developing new prototypes in a very short time.

The nRF7002 DK is the development kit for the nRF7002 Wi-Fi 6 Companion IC. It contains everything needed to get started developing on a single board. The DK features an nRF5340 multiprotocol System-on-Chip (SoC) as a host processor for the nRF7002.
Prototyping platform designed for the development of cellular IoT applications.

products.description: Secure, power-efficient, and low-cost SiP (System-in-Package) radio module with ordering code of BGM220SC22WGA2, based on the EFR32BG22 Wireless Gecko SoC. products.productName: Silicon Labs BGM220S SiP module with RF shield, high TX power, and larger Flash memory
products.description: Secure, power-efficient, and low-cost SiP (System-in-Package) radio module with ordering code of BGM220SC22HNA2, based on the EFR32BG22 Wireless Gecko SoC. The Bluetooth Dual-mode BR/EDR and Low Energy PCB radio module with model name and ordering code of BT121-A is targeted for applications requiring connectivity to legacy devices that only support SPP or  iAP2 profiles as well as to devices that support Bluetooth Low Energy. It integrates a high-performance Bluetooth radio, a low
power ARM Cortex micro-controller and a Silicon Labs Dual Mode stack software. It can be used as a modem together with a separate host MCU, but applications can also be embedded into the MCU with the Silicon Labs BGScript™ scripting language.
